def modify_features(df_input) -> pd.DataFrame:
    """
    Thought 1: Combining the uniformity of cell size and cell shape with clump thickness into a single metric can provide an overall measure of abnormality in cellular structure. This could help differentiate between benign and malignant cases.
    New Feature 1: structural_abnormality_index | structural_abnormality_index = (Cell_Size_Uniformity + Cell_Shape_Uniformity + Clump_Thickness) / 3
    """
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    """
    Thought 1: Combining the uniformity of cell size and cell shape with clump thickness into a single metric can provide an overall measure of abnormality in cellular structure. This could help differentiate between benign and malignant cases.
    New Feature 1: structural_abnormality_index | structural_abnormality_index = (Cell_Size_Uniformity + Cell_Shape_Uniformity + Clump_Thickness) / 3

    Thought 2: A low count of bare nuclei and a high frequency of mitotic cell division may indicate a more aggressive cellular behavior.
    New Feature 2: aggressive_behavior_index | aggressive_behavior_index = -np.log(Bare_Nuclei + 1) + Mitoses  # Avoiding log on zero

    Thought 3: A higher uniformity in cell size and shape may indicate a less aggressive cellular behavior, while a higher clump thickness may indicate the opposite.
    New Feature 3: risk_score | risk_score = (1 - Cell_Size_Uniformity) * (1 - Cell_Shape_Uniformity) + Clump_Thickness  # Inverse relation with uniformity and direct relation with clump thickness

    Thought 4: A high normal nucleoli count may indicate a more malignant tumor, while a low mitotic activity index may indicate a less aggressive tumor.
    New Feature 4: malignancy_score | malignancy_score = Normal_Nucleoli / (Mitoses * mitotic_activity_index)

    Thought 5: Combining the uniformity of nucleus texture with the uniformity of cell size and cell shape into a single metric can provide an overall measure of cellular structure uniformity.
    New Feature 5: uniformity_score | uniformity_score = (Cell_Size_Uniformity + Cell_Shape_Uniformity + nucleus_texture_uniformity) / 3

    Thought 6: A high clump thickness can indicate a more aggressive tumor, while a high bare nuclei count can indicate a less aggressive tumor.
    New Feature 6: tumor_aggressiveness_score | tumor_aggressiveness_score = Clump_Thickness / (Bare_Nuclei + 1)
    """
    df_output = df_input.copy()
